Update the relevant files in the documents folder and the README.md to reflect the recent changes made in the codebase. **Do not remove information** unless it is outdated, but make sure to add any new features or changes that have been implemented. Also don't forget to update information that is now outdated due to the changes.

Also don't forget to update information that is now outdated due to the changes.

Again, it is important to not remove any information unless it is outdated or incorrect!
